title: Debug auto-login in all Simulator builds — hardcoded session token persisted to Keychain
description: applyReviewSessionIfNeeded() auto-authenticates every DEBUG+Simulator run with hardcoded sessionToken: 'simulator-debug-token' persisted to Keychain. No explicit opt-in required. Risk: fake session used against staging/production Supabase endpoints.
recommended_fix: Gate behind explicit developer flag, not just #if DEBUG + Simulator check

title: Review-mode hardcoded token persisted to Keychain without #if DEBUG guard
description: sessionToken: 'review-session-token' saved to Keychain. applyReviewSessionIfNeeded() has no #if DEBUG guard. A production build with FITTRACKER_REVIEW_AUTH set would persist this token.
recommended_fix: Wrap in #if DEBUG or use a build-configuration-specific flag

title: signOut() swallows Supabase error silently — server-side JWT remains valid
description: try? await supabase.auth.signOut(scope: .local) — failure is discarded, server-side JWT remains valid. Uses .local scope only.
recommended_fix: Handle signOut error, consider using .global scope for complete logout

title: hasRegisteredPasskey in unnamespaced UserDefaults — survives sign-out, shared across users
description: Key ft.passkeyRegistered survives sign-out and is shared across users on the same device. New user inherits previous user's passkey state.
evidence: UserDefaults key not namespaced by userID
recommended_fix: Namespace by userID or clear on sign-out

title: restoreSession() timeout race has logic gap — continuation never resumed on timeout
description: The timeout task cancels work but never calls continuation.resume(). Timeout task also not cancelled when work returns nil.
recommended_fix: Resume continuation with nil or error in timeout path, cancel timeout on normal completion

title: Passkey assertion not verified server-side — acts as local-only auth
description: WebAuthn signature used as sessionToken raw Base64, never sent to backend for cryptographic verification. backendAccessToken is nil for passkey sessions. Passkey is local-only with no backend trust anchor.
evidence: No server-side verification of WebAuthn assertion
recommended_fix: Send assertion to backend for verification, obtain proper backend token

title: pushPendingChanges() silently drops all individual push errors
description: Empty catch { anyFailed = true } — no logging, no identification of which records failed, no retry scheduling.
recommended_fix: Log errors, identify failed records, schedule retry

title: try? on session retrieval treats auth expiry as silent no-op
description: fetchChanges(), fetchAllRecords(), pushPendingChanges(), uploadCardioImage() all use try? for supabase.auth.session. Token refresh failure is invisible.
evidence: try? on auth.session in multiple methods
recommended_fix: Handle auth session errors explicitly, trigger re-auth flow

title: lastPull timestamp not namespaced by userID — shared across users
description: supabase.lastPull in UserDefaults is shared across users. Could cause data sync issues on user switch.
recommended_fix: Namespace by userID

title: Decryption errors during pull silently skipped, lastPull advances
description: Per-row empty catch block. lastPull timestamp advances even when rows failed — failed records never retried.
evidence: Empty catch in row processing loop
recommended_fix: Track failed rows, don't advance lastPull past failures, schedule retry

title: Realtime subscription can spawn concurrent fetchChanges() tasks
description: Bulk server events (30 INSERTs) spawn 30 Tasks. guard case .idle stops most but no debouncing.
recommended_fix: Add debounce (e.g., 500ms) to batch realtime events

title: Singleton sync digests not namespaced by userID — shared across users
description: supabase.user_profile, supabase.user_preferences, supabase.meal_templates shared across users.
recommended_fix: Namespace all UserDefaults keys by userID

title: HMAC timestamp in encrypted envelope never validated for staleness
description: Timestamp is in signed data but never checked for staleness or validity during decryption. Uses .bitPattern (non-standard serialization).
recommended_fix: Validate timestamp within acceptable range during decryption

title: rotateKeys() not atomic — crash mid-rotation can corrupt data
description: Keys saved to Keychain after blobs re-encrypted. Crash after encryption but before key persistence = new blobs undecryptable. Crash after first key but before all three = partial key state.
recommended_fix: Use transaction-like approach: save new keys first, then re-encrypt, then delete old keys

title: .biometryCurrentSet invalidates all encrypted data on biometric enrollment change
description: Adding a new face/finger permanently revokes access to all encrypted health data with no recovery path. Data loss risk.
recommended_fix: Use .biometryAny or implement key recovery mechanism

title: persistToDisk() errors silently set lastError only — callers are fire-and-forget
description: All callers use Task { await persistToDisk() }. Disk-full or encryption errors cause data to be in-memory only, lost on next launch.
recommended_fix: Add completion handler or retry mechanism for persistence failures

title: CloudKit directly mutates dataStore.dailyLogs bypassing mutation API
description: Direct dataStore.dailyLogs[idx].needsSync = false bypasses markSynced() and does not trigger persistToDisk(). Sync state lost on crash.
recommended_fix: Use markSynced() API to ensure persistence is triggered

title: CloudKit daily log merge doesn't check needsSync before remote-wins
description: Unlike mergeWeeklySnapshot(), daily log merge replaces local data based on timestamp alone, ignoring unsaved local edits (needsSync = true).
evidence: Missing needsSync check in daily log merge
recommended_fix: Check needsSync before overwriting with remote data

title: deleteAllUserRecords() deletes CloudKit records one-by-one — partial deletion risk
description: Sequential individual deletes for 365+ records. Any failure leaves partial deletion. Should use CKModifyRecordsOperation with batches of 400.
recommended_fix: Use CKModifyRecordsOperation with batch size 400

title: KeychainHelper.save() discards SecItemAdd return status
description: SecItemAdd result not checked. Silent Keychain save failure causes session to be in-memory only, lost on next launch.
recommended_fix: Check SecItemAdd status, handle failures

title: Full UserSession JSON with live JWT stored as single unprotected Keychain item
description: backendAccessToken (live Supabase JWT), email, phone all in one item with only WhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly. Should separate JWT into tighter ACL.
evidence: Single Keychain item with all credentials
recommended_fix: Separate JWT into its own Keychain item with tighter access control

title: Continuation leaked on concurrent startSignIn() calls — first caller hangs
description: Second call to startSignIn() overwrites self.continuation, leaking the first (Swift Concurrency warning, first caller hangs indefinitely).
recommended_fix: Resume previous continuation with cancellation error before overwriting

title: Account deletion grace period stored only in UserDefaults, never synced to Supabase
description: Comment says 'will be synced' but no Supabase call exists. Reinstall during grace period silently cancels deletion.
evidence: Missing Supabase sync for deletion state
recommended_fix: Sync deletion request to Supabase, check on app launch

title: executeDeletion() deletes data rows but not Supabase Auth user record — incomplete GDPR
description: After account deletion, the Supabase Auth user (email address) persists. Incomplete GDPR deletion.
recommended_fix: Delete Supabase Auth user record as part of account deletion

title: Hardcoded verification code '48291' in local email auth provider
description: LocalEmailAuthProvider uses hardcoded verification code for development.
recommended_fix: Ensure this never ships to production, add #if DEBUG guard

title: pushSingletons() checksum skip doesn't verify server has the record
description: Checksum match skips push but doesn't verify server actually has the record.
recommended_fix: Add server-side existence check or track push confirmation

title: deleteStoredKeys() followed by encrypt() silently generates new keys
description: No error when encrypting after key deletion — generates fresh keys silently, old data unrecoverable.
recommended_fix: Make encrypt() fail if keys were explicitly deleted

title: Comment references non-existent MockEmailAuthProvider
description: Code comment references a mock that doesn't exist in the codebase.
recommended_fix: Remove stale comment

title: sleepGoalHours hardcoded as 8.0 with TODO comment
description: TODO to make configurable, currently hardcoded for all users.
recommended_fix: Make configurable per user preferences

title: generateNonce() and sha256() are dead code
description: Utility functions exist but are never called from any code path.
recommended_fix: Remove dead code
